name: Sylvester and the entity of Dust
short_description: Play as Sylvester on his odyssey to save Gaia from the entity of Dust.In this game you will play as Sylvester, a Golem that Gaia has sent to save the world from an infection brought by the entity of dust.An action RPG game integrating Rogue Lite dimensions.Join the odyssey now!
detailed_description:
Sylvester and the entity of Dust is an Action RPG game with Rogue Lite mecamism. Embark on an epic adventure in stunning 3D isometric view, powered by the graphical power of Unreal Engine 5.

Dive into a visually striking world where low-poly models meet cartoon aesthetics in an innovative 3D isometric design.

As Sylvester, face your destiny across:

  • 40+ intense levels spanning 3 diverse biomes,

  • 25 unique enemy types to outsmart and overpower,

  • 6 intimidating bosses,

  • 28 powerful weapons to master and boosters,

  • Rogue-lite elements : Random weapon drops and boosters keep every run fresh, Permanent death raises the stake.

Are you ready to conquer the Entity of Dust in this unforgiving action-RPG experience ?
